portability_tests.description: A selected synthetic ChatGPT conversations.json history is parsed offline, staged, reviewed, published as external data, exported generically, and retained through the shutdown escape surface without provider credentials or model execution.

limitations: CI uses only synthetic non-private conversations.json bytes and proves the bounded source-adapter foundation, not the project-owner migration drill.
The adapter accepts one explicitly supplied conversations.json file only; ZIP extraction and numbered-file aggregation are not implemented.
Only explicitly selected conversations are mapped into staged content objects.
The observed provider JSON shape is versioned adapter behavior and is not claimed as a stable OpenAI public schema.

Non-text content, attachment references, unsupported roles, malformed nodes, missing parents, cycles, conflicting duplicates, and unknown provider fields are quarantined or reported through mapping and loss records.
No account merge, sidebar restoration, memory migration, GPT migration, settings migration, file restoration, target-specific export, or round-trip fidelity is claimed.
PORT-014 and the ChatGPT history migration claim remain pending until privacy-reviewed exact-commit private manual evidence is accepted.
The complete Phase 6 gate and stable general anti-lock-in remain incomplete.
